name: Strategy
tagline: Where to play, how to win

coreMetrics.name: Market Share
coreMetrics.description: Percentage of addressable market captured in target segments

coreMetrics.name: Competitive Win Rate
coreMetrics.description: Percentage of competitive deals won when head-to-head with known competitors

coreMetrics.name: Strategic Initiative Completion Rate
coreMetrics.description: Percentage of quarterly strategic initiatives completed on time and within scope

coreMetrics.name: Customer Concentration Risk
coreMetrics.description: Revenue percentage from top 3 customers — high concentration signals fragility

weeklyRhythm.activity: Strategy pulse — review strategic initiative status, flag blockers, confirm weekly priorities align with quarterly goals
Competitive scan — review competitor moves, pricing changes, product launches, hiring signals, and market news

monthlyRhythm.deliverable: Updated competitive landscape map with new entrants, positioning shifts, and pricing changes
Initiative progress report with RAG status, blockers, and resource needs
One-page market signal brief synthesising customer feedback, competitor moves, and macro trends
Draft quarterly strategy update with key decisions, pivots, and next quarter priorities

whatToDelegate.when: Once you have a repeatable framework for what to track and how to score competitors
When you need regular industry reports, trend summaries, or TAM analysis refreshed
When you have 3+ initiatives running and status chasing eats your time
whatToDelegate.toWhom: Chief of Staff or ops lead
